## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Breaking change (describe the impact below)

## Checklist

- [ ] `mix test` passes
- [ ] `mix credo --strict` passes
- [ ] `mix format` has been run
- [ ] If I changed a component, the source module (`lib/pulsar/components/*.ex`)
      and its template (`priv/templates/*.ex.eex`) are kept in sync
      (`Pulsar.TemplateSyncTest` enforces this)
- [ ] Accessibility behavior is preserved (ARIA, keyboard nav); audit doc
      updated if relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` for user-visible changes

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, known gaps (this is an early-stage
project), or follow-ups. -->
